items.title: Why is Notre Dame’s Jordan Faison being disrespected like this?

items.title: One thing I like about every Notre Dame football opponent this season
items.summary: We spend a lot of time tearing down opponents on the internet. We also spend a lot of time defending opponents on the internet — as a way to defend an overall football schedule. items.title: It’s time to leave the Catholics VS Convicts shirt in the closet
items.summary: It’s been over 35 years since Notre Dame beat Miami in one of the greatest college football games of all-time. Yes, 1988 was a very long time ago, and yet Notre Dame fans still like to bask in that gory sun just a little too much. Irish fans, can be at times, living in the […]

items.title: How would you rank Notre Dame’s position groups?
items.summary: We’re doing A LOT of talking about rankings and which Notre Dame player is the best here and there, but football isn’t an individual sport — it’s a team game comprised of groups. So, which are the best position groups at Notre Dame? You know what? Why don’t you just rank them for me in […]

items.title: Four Notre Dame players rank in the top 50 by PFF College
items.summary: I recently finished my Top 20 list of Notre Dame football players for 2026 with a full explanation of why I had who, where (sort of).
